_comment: About page content. Edit here — no code changes needed.

hero.label: Since 1998
hero.sub: Kiran Publicity is one of India's most trusted outdoor advertising houses — headquartered in Samastipur, strongest across Bihar and Jharkhand, and live in every metro that matters.

story.label: Our Story
story.heading: From one hoarding in Samastipur to 400+ sites across India.
paragraphs: In 1998, Kiran Deshmukh leased a single 20×10 hoarding on Samastipur's Station Road and painted it by hand for a local jeweller. The phone didn't stop ringing for a month.

Today we operate one of eastern India's largest independent outdoor networks — premium billboards, transit fleets, and digital LED screens across Bihar, Jharkhand, and every major metro — still run by the same family, still obsessed with the same question: will people stop and look?
We don't sell media space. We engineer attention — the right structure, on the right junction, lit the right way, at the right hour.

timeline.title: The First Hoarding
timeline.body: Kiran Deshmukh leases and hand-paints a single hoarding on Station Road, Samastipur.

timeline.title: Mumbai Calling
timeline.body: First premium sites on the Western Express Highway — the network goes metro.

timeline.title: Transit Media
timeline.body: 500 bus wraps across Bihar and Jharkhand routes make KP the region's largest transit advertiser.

timeline.title: Going Digital
timeline.body: First large-format LED screens installed in Pune and Nagpur city centres.

timeline.title: 400 Sites
timeline.body: The owned network crosses 400 structures — every major NH junction covered.

timeline.title: Programmatic OOH
timeline.body: Real-time booking and audience analytics roll out across the digital network.

values.title: Visibility First
values.body: A site that doesn't stop traffic doesn't make the network. We walk every junction before we build.

values.title: Straight Dealing
values.body: Photographic proof-of-display for every campaign, every month. No surprises on the invoice.

values.title: Built to Last
values.body: Our structures outlive monsoons. Engineering-certified steel, annual audits, zero downtime.

values.title: Local Depth
values.body: We know which side of the flyover gets the evening crawl. Thirty years of street-level data.

team.label: The People
team.heading: Run by owners, not account managers.

items.quote: KP's Western Express sites carried our IPO campaign to 20 million commuters. Flawless execution, weekly photo proofs.
items.name: Meera Nair

items.quote: The only vendor who told us NOT to buy a site because the sightline was blocked. That honesty bought a decade of business.
items.name: Arjun Bhatt

items.quote: From artwork to installation in 72 hours across 9 cities. Nobody else in the country moves this fast.
items.name: Sanjana Rao

items.quote: Their Pune LED network delivered 3× the footfall lift of our previous OOH partner. The data reporting is genuinely best-in-class.
items.name: Vikram Sethi

cta.heading: Your brand belongs up there.
cta.sub: Talk to the team that owns the skyline.
